subtitle.en: a male Anna's hummingbird flashes electric pink at one angle and black at another — flat melanin platelets in barbules form a multilayer that's sharp in colour and sharp in direction
subtitle.ko: 수컷 벌새 gorget이 한 각도에서 핑크 flash, 다른 각도에선 검정 — 평평한 melanin platelet 다층

description.en: Bird silhouette with gorget that brightens in narrow ±8° angular window. Contrast with Morpho's broad-angle design highlights specular vs diffuse iridescence trade-off.
description.ko: Bird silhouette + gorget이 좁은 ±8° 각도창에서 밝아짐. Morpho의 광각과 대조 — specular vs diffuse iridescence.
